commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Maintainers need to choose a rebase or narrow replacement for the conflicting branch, and the contributor needs inspectable real Synology proof before merge.; Needs attention: No supply-chain or secret-handling issue was found, but the intentional unauthenticated HEAD liveness response needs maintainer acknowledgment before merge. commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Synology Chat webhook handler to return 200 for HEAD probes and 200 JSON success ACKs for accepted POSTs, then updates the related Synology Chat tests from 204 to 200.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +14. Total +26 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows HEAD requests hit the non-POST 405 path and accepted POSTs still return the 204 ACK helper; I did not run a live Synology NAS reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to choose a rebase or narrow replacement for the conflicting branch, and the contributor needs inspectable real Synology proof before merge.
